FIDUCARO
HomeSendDecryptDisruptorGaslessProtocol

FIDUCARO is live on Ethereum mainnet

SEND buries value, Decrypt retrieves hidden balances, and Disruptor projects a visible zero-net Transfer signal. Every command uses real Ethereum execution and requires your wallet approval.

Protocol Library

Protocol diagrams and reference assets

Open the diagrams and identity assets that define the live FIDUCARO command surface, its hidden-balance flow, selective retrieval, and public-chain disruption layer.

Enter With Control

Connect deliberately, read every wallet request, and keep the recovery record under your control until the complete two-part SEND resolves.

Verify Each Step

Check the network, active account, token and protocol addresses, requested method, amount, and resulting receipt before drawing a conclusion.

Read the Chain

Inspect transaction hashes, interface state, emitted events, and final balances. Never publish SALTs, recovery records, private keys, or identifying wallet details.

FIDUCARO

FIDUCARO is a live Ethereum protocol for burying balances, retrieving hidden value, and projecting zero-net transfer signals onto the public record.

Social
@fiducaroprivacy

FIDUCARO — Private value. Public disruption. Live on Ethereum.

Every command is user-approved and executed on chain.
